policies.line1: Consistency is key for best results
policies.line2: Results vary based on skin type and consistency
policies.line3: Consultation form required prior to service

1.title: HydraSilk Facial
1.desc: A deeply nourishing treatment designed to replenish moisture, restore the skin barrier, and leave the skin soft, plump, and luminous.

2.title: Pure Balance Facial
2.desc: A refining facial focused on regulating oil production, clearing congestion, and rebalancing the skin without over-stripping.

3.title: The Signature SORA Facial
3.desc: A luxury customized treatment tailored to your skin’s unique needs, combining hydration, correction, and glow-enhancing techniques.

4.title: Acne Restoration Facial
4.desc: A corrective treatment designed for ongoing acne management, targeting active breakouts, inflammation and post-acne marks.
restrictions: This facial is available to returning clients only
New clients must first book a Custom Facial before this treatment can be scheduled

about.title: About SŌRA Aesthetics
paragraphs: SŌRA Aesthetics is a female-owned, results-driven skincare studio based in the Capital Region of New York, created as a space where skin health, intention, and self-care meet.
I specialize in customized facials that address acne, hyperpigmentation, uneven texture, and dull skin, while prioritizing barrier health and long-term results.

My approach blends advanced skincare techniques with education and presence, allowing each treatment to feel purposeful and restorative so clients not only see results, but leave feeling cared for, confident, and connected to their skin.

1.title: Dermaplaning
1.desc: Gently removes dead skin and peach fuzz to reveal smoother, brighter skin and allow products to penetrate more effectively.

2.title: Red LED Light Therapy
2.desc: Helps calm inflammation, promote healing, and support collagen production. Ideal for acne, sensitivity, and post-treatment recovery.

reviews.title:
CUSTOMERS
REVIEWS
reviews.subtitle: See what our customers think about our services

1.name: Cecelia
1.text: This is my first time getting a facial and Shaima did not disappoint! Her energy was amazing, and made me completely comfortable, while also being able to explain anything to me that I had questions on. The facial was so good I fell asleep in the middle of it and in the end I loved the results. I will definitely be going back!!

2.name: Abby
2.text: After my facial at SŌRA my skin feels and looks so so good i can’t express enough how amazing she did. I am GLOWING, I feel so relaxed and refreshed that was truly the best experience im already so excited for my next appointment! Thank you thank you thank you!!!!

3.name: Noor
3.text: Thank you so very much to SŌRA I’m in love with my facial! My face feels so clean, bright, and refreshed. Thank you so much for such an amazing service!

4.name: Mars
4.text: Shay knows her craft and it shows so clearly. She is so welcoming and makes sure to start by covering what goals you have with your skin or any concerns you've been having. She'll go above and beyond to achieve them, and will make you feel relaxed and comfortable the entire time. I loved my experience and can't wait to go back for my next facial. The products she uses are gentle and so is she!
